input: Mama mboga anauza mboga sokoni. Wiki hii alinunua mboga kwa KSh 5,000 na kuuza kwa KSh 8,500. Gharama za usafiri ni KSh 500. Faida yake ni ngapi?
expected_output: Faida yako wiki hii ni KSh 3,000. Umepata KSh 8,500 kutoka kwenye mauzo, ukiondoa KSh 5,000 za kununua mboga na KSh 500 za usafiri, inabaki KSh 3,000. Hii ni faida ya 60% kwenye mtaji wako.

input: I have a shop. Last month I spent KSh 50,000 on stock and earned KSh 72,000 in sales. My rent is KSh 8,000 and transport was KSh 3,000. What is my profit?
expected_output: Your profit last month was KSh 11,000. You earned KSh 72,000 from sales, minus KSh 50,000 stock cost, minus KSh 8,000 rent, minus KSh 3,000 transport = KSh 11,000. Your profit margin is about 15%.

input: Boda boda rider anapata KSh 1,500 kwa siku. Gharama za mafuta ni KSh 400, maintenance KSh 100 kwa siku. Anaendesha siku 26 kwa mwezi. Mapato yake ya mwezi ni yapi?
expected_output: Mapato yako ya mwezi ni KSh 26,000. Gharama za mwezi ni KSh 13,000 (mafuta KSh 10,400 + maintenance KSh 2,600). Faida yako ni KSh 13,000 kwa mwezi. Hii ni KSh 500 kwa siku baada ya gharama.

input: My tomato business: I buy 50kg at KSh 80/kg = KSh 4,000. I sell at KSh 150/kg but 10% goes bad. What is my actual profit?
expected_output: You sell 45kg (50kg minus 10% spoilage = 5kg lost). Revenue: 45kg × KSh 150 = KSh 6,750. Cost: KSh 4,000. Profit: KSh 2,750. Your effective margin is 69% but spoilage cuts it. Tip: store tomatoes in a cool place to reduce spoilage.

input: Nina duka la vifaa vya nyumbani. Mwezi huu nimenunua bidhaa kwa KSh 200,000. Nimeuza KSh 180,000 tu kwa sababu mvua ilikuwa na athari. Nifanye nini?
expected_output: Umesahau kuingiza gharama zako nyingine (kodi, umeme, usafiri). Kwa mauzo ya KSh 180,000 na mtaji wa KSh 200,000, una hasara ya KSh 20,000 kwenye bidhaa pekee. Hatua: 1) Angalia bidhaa zilizobaki — zitauza wiki ijayo? 2) Punguza ununuzi wiki ijayo. 3) Fikiria kupunguza bei kuuza haraka. 4) Weka kumbukumbu ya mauzo kila siku ili kuona mwenendo.

input: A mama mboga wants to save for a KSh 50,000 freezer. She saves KSh 200/day. How many days until she can buy it?
expected_output: At KSh 200/day, it will take 250 days (about 8 months) to save KSh 50,000. That is too long. Suggestions: 1) Join a chama to pool savings. 2) Look for a used freezer at KSh 25,000. 3) Increase daily savings by selling higher-margin items. 4) Consider M-Shwari loan if business case is strong.

input: Nina boda boda. Wiki hii nimefanya safari 85, kila safari napata KSh 100. Mafuta ni KSh 2,500. Nifanye nini kupata zaidi?
expected_output: Mapato yako ya wiki: 85 safari × KSh 100 = KSh 8,500. Baada ya mafuta: KSh 6,000. Mapato ya siku: KSh 857. Vidokezo: 1) Ondoka mapema asubuhi — wateja wengi wanahitaji usafiri 6-8am. 2) Tafuta mikataba ya kudumu (shule, ofisi). 3) Epuka kusubiri sana — badilisha eneo. 4) Fikiria kuongeza bei kidogo kwa safari ndefu.

input: I sell sukuma wiki (kales). I buy a bunch at KSh 20 and sell at KSh 50. I sell 200 bunches per day but 20 go bad. Calculate my daily profit.
expected_output: You sell 180 bunches (200 - 20 spoilage). Revenue: 180 × KSh 50 = KSh 9,000. Cost: 200 × KSh 20 = KSh 4,000. Daily profit: KSh 5,000. Spoilage costs you KSh 1,000/day (20 bunches × KSh 50 lost revenue). Tips: buy less or sell faster in the afternoon at reduced price.

input: Bi Asha ana duka. Mwezi uliopita alipata faida ya KSh 15,000. Mwezi huu amepata KSh 22,000. Ongezeko la faida ni asilimia ngapi?
expected_output: Ongezeko la faida ni KSh 7,000, ambayo ni 46.7% zaidi ya mwezi uliopita. Hii ni mwenendo mzuri! Angalia ni bidhaa gani zilisaidia kupata ongezeko hili na zingatia kununua zaidi.

input: Transport business: 3 boda bodas, each earns KSh 1,500/day. Fuel per bike: KSh 400/day. Maintenance: KSh 5,000/month total. What is monthly profit?
expected_output: Monthly revenue: 3 bikes × KSh 1,500 × 30 days = KSh 135,000. Monthly fuel: 3 × KSh 400 × 30 = KSh 36,000. Maintenance: KSh 5,000. Total costs: KSh 41,000. Monthly profit: KSh 94,000. Per bike profit: KSh 31,333/month or KSh 1,044/day.
